title: Self and the Brain. The Immune Metaphor.

assets.abstract: One of the fundamental questions in neuroscience is how brain activity relates to conscious experience. Even though self-consciousness is considered an emergent property of the brain network, a quantum physics-based theory assigns a momentum of consciousness to the single neuron level. In this work, we present a brain self theory from an evolutionary biological perspective by analogy with the immune self. In this scheme, perinatal reactivity to self inputs would guide the selection of neocortica

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Bridge paper score=8.5: links Birth/Body concept to mechanistic neuroscience
